name: lumina-scan
description: An autonomous Web3 security auditor with x402/MPP agentic payments on Stellar. Scans smart contracts for vulnerabilities using Llama 3.3 70B and anchors immutable audit proofs on-chain via SHA-256 Memo.hash.

auth.description: Machine-payable via Stellar x402/MPP protocol. Usage-based micro-payments in USDC — starting at $0.10 per scan.

tools.name: analyze_smart_contract
tools.description: Analyze a smart contract for security vulnerabilities. Returns a structured report with a vulnerability score (0-100 safety metric), risk level, individual issues with severity ratings, remediation code suggestions, and an immutable on-chain audit proof anchored to the Stellar blockchain via Memo.hash.

contractCode.description: The full source code of the smart contract to audit. Supports Solidity, Rust (Soroban), Move, and other Web3 languages.

contractType.description: The language or framework of the smart contract. Helps the auditor apply language-specific vulnerability patterns.

vulnerabilityScore.description: Safety score from 0 (extremely dangerous) to 100 (perfectly safe).

riskLevel.description: Categorical risk classification based on the highest severity issue found.

issues.description: List of individual security issues with title, description, severity, suggestion, and remediation code.

auditProofTxHash.description: Stellar testnet transaction hash anchoring the SHA-256 of this report on-chain.

code.description: The smart contract source code to analyze.

tools.name: unlock_remediation_patch
tools.description: Unlock the remediation code for a specific CRITICAL or HIGH severity issue. Pay-for-Patch: premium solution code is gated behind a 1 USDC micropayment.

issueIndex.description: The zero-based index of the issue whose remediation patch should be unlocked.

unlocked.description: Whether the patch was successfully unlocked.

issueIndex.description: The index of the unlocked issue.
Zero-based index of the issue to unlock.

session_payments.description: Pre-authorize a USDC deposit for frictionless pay-as-you-go scanning. Bypasses per-request wallet signatures.
